description: ECB Systemic & Sovereign Stress Engine - pulls the ECB CISS (systemic financial stress; euro area + US/UK/CN/DE/FR/IT/ES) and SovCISS (sovereign stress per euro-area country) from the ECB Data Portal into percentile-ranked stress reads, a 0-100 composite and a euro fragmentation gauge. Output data/systemic-stress.json.

schedule.description: ECB Systemic & Sovereign Stress Engine — daily 12:00 UTC
